W

writeCsvFromSqlServerAllTablesDiff(String, long, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, ArrayList<String>, boolean, boolean, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
Connects to a Sql Server with a Database and Schema context, iterates through all tables and compares a table against a given Snowflake Database and Schema context with a table of the same name, and creates a compressed CSV file of the difference between the two tables.
writeCsvFromSqlServerAllTablesFull(String, long, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
Connects to a Sql Server with a Database and Schema context, iterates through all tables and compares a table against a given Snowflake Database and Schema context with a table of the same name, and creates a compressed CSV file of the full table within the SQL S Once the file has been created, the file will be sent to a specified Azure Blob Storage container.
writeCsvFromSqlServerTableDiff(String, String, long, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
Establishes time range to create differential extracts for specific table
writeCsvFromSqlServerTableFull(String, String, long, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
TODO: suspend warehouse after complete
writeCsvFromSqlServerTableValueLimit(String, String, long, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String, boolean) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
Takes source table and creates a *.csv or *.csv.gz based on a source Sql Server host, database, schema, and table, compares to specified remote Snowfalke instance, compute, database, schema, and table to build column ordinal sensitive datasets with optionaly compressing the file via GZip.
writeSql(String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
00_CREATE.sql 01_DELETE.sql 02_COPYINTO.sql
writeSqlCreateTable(String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class jch.lib.db.snowflake.SnowflakeDbScour
Writes CREATE TABLE statements to file, and optionally send to Azure Blob Container.
